identity.title: Music Is My Drug (Rooklyn Mix)
identity.styleSentence: A driving D major dance-pop track at 129 bpm featuring a rolling bassline, punchy drums, and an anthemic vocal delivery that builds from intimate verses to a massive, euphoric chorus.

lyrics.text:
Oh baby,
turn it up now, feel that bass line run
Yeah, I can't get enough
Come on
Turn it up now, feel that bass line run
Yeah,
I can't get enough
Come on
First note hits my skin
Turn it up now, feel that bass line run
Bass rollin' through my chest
Goosebumps rushin' in
Like I forgot the rest
One song can start a fire
One hook can stop the pain
One beat can make us strangers
Then bring us back again
When the world gets heavy
Music clears my mind
When my heart gets messy
It makes the broken shine
Under all this rhythm
Something comes alive
Music is my drug
Feel it in my body
Feel it in my mind
Music is my drug
Eyes
shut to the feelings
Spirit in the sky
Don't stop now
Music is my drug
It gives me chills
Chills inside
It gets me high
I'm alive
I'm alive
I'm alive
Da da da da da da
Oh!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
It
makes me laugh in color
Makes me cry in blue
Makes me dance with memory
I thought I never knew
Turns pain into motion
Turns silence into gold
Makes a room of strangers
Feel like one big soul
Woo!
When the night gets lonely
Music pulls me close
When the road gets crazy
The high I need the most
Under all this rhythm
Something comes alive
Music is my drug
Woo!
Feel it in my body
Feel it in my mind
Music is my drug
Eyes shut to the feelings
Spirit in the sky
Don't stop now
Music is my drug
It gives me chills inside
It gets me high
I'm alive
I'm alive
I'm alive
It's the laugh after crying
It's the scream in the dark
It's the hands in the air
It's the beat in my heart
Every drop
Every drum
Every voice
Every one
When the bass line comes
We become the song
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Woo!
Music is my drug
Feel it in my body
Music is my drug
Feel it in my mind
Music is my drug
Eyes shut to the feelings
Spirit in the sky
Music is my drug
Woo!
It gets me high
Music is my job
Turn it up
Music is my job

analysis.summary: This driving D major dance-pop anthem explores music as a powerful life-saving substance that transforms pain into euphoria and unites strangers into one soul through rhythm.

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Growing physical sensation of the bassline

keywords.imageryPrompt: A glowing neon pill dissolving into a river of golden light that flows upward, representing addiction to positive energy.
Blue and purple flames dancing in the wind without burning anything, illuminating faces with warmth rather than destruction.
A dark gray stone cracking open to reveal a bright yellow flower growing from the center of the fracture.
Human silhouettes with visible golden veins pulsing against a deep indigo background, radiating light outward.
A swirling galaxy of connected human hands merging into one single luminous sphere in the center of space.
Silent dust turning instantly into shimmering metallic flakes that float upwards, catching the light from below.
